visual_checklist_notes.reference_match: Generated drawing does not match the same-name reference: the dimension scheme, note placement, and sheet composition visibly differ.
visual_checklist_notes.view_layout: Reference uses compact front/top/right/iso layout with dimensions near each view; generated layout spreads views and dimension chains differently.
visual_checklist_notes.display_dimensions: Required semantic dimensions are missing or regressed after pruning; generated view shows an over-concentrated and mismatched dimension chain.
visual_checklist_notes.dimension_readability: Several generated dimensions overlap or are visually crowded near the main view, unlike the readable reference spacing.
visual_checklist_notes.title_block: Generated title block does not follow the compact reference title/data style and is visually separated from the expected lower sheet information.
visual_checklist_notes.manufacturing_notes: Generated technical notes do not match the reference note content/position; required manufacturing notes remain visually incomplete.

findings: Application Drawing Review screenshot shows generated 006 is visually not equivalent to the reference drawing.
Post-layout explicit dimensions were created, but final persisted coverage regressed to 9/12 after pruning.
The drawing remains unsuitable for acceptance because UI screenshot review fails every required checklist item.
entries.required_correction: Fix generator layout and pruning so the final persisted drawing keeps all 12 reference-intent DisplayDim targets, then regenerate 006 and repeat Drawing Review UI screenshot validation before moving to 007/008/009/015/022.
